title: Ubiquiti UC-Display
description: UC-Display is a standalone touch display device managed by the UniFi Connect application. The 21.5" display runs on the Android operating system and is equipped with a microphone and speaker. It can be attached to a VESA standard mount (an adapter for mounting to a VESA mount is included in the package). Optionally, additional adapters for surface or flush mount, a table stand or a arm mount can be purchased. Installation is possible in both horizontal and vertical positions, the function of… Using the UniFi Connect application, 3 different functions can be easily assigned to the display: Display selected web pages Display the selected Android application View your own multimedia content (photo/video) Display selected web pages Display the selected Android application View your own multimedia content (photo/video) The display thus offers versatile use. You can use it as an in-store kiosk to browse your own website and place online orders, or you can project a promo video loop, for example. In exposed places where people stay for a long time, such as waiting rooms in hospitals or airport halls, it is offered to display applications for the Android OS, for example various games or quizzes to pass the time Device VESA adapter for 75x75 or 100x100
